feed.title: DzBoom

entry.title: India VS China India bans power equipment imports from China, Pak-R K Singh

link.title: India VS China India bans power equipment imports from China, Pak-R K Singh

entry.content:
ஜூன் மாதத்தில், இந்திய ராணுவ வீரர்களைத் தாக்கியதில் இருந்து, இந்தியா மற்றும் சீனாவுக்கு இடையிலான பிரச்சனைகள், வெறுமனே எல்லைப் பிரச்சனையாக இல்லை.
India ban china power equipment import and plan to tax 25% on china solar equipment India hit back china with another ban. India ban Chinese power equipment import and plan to levy 25% tax on Chinese solar equipment.
#IndiaChinaBorderFight
#IndiaChinaBorder
entry.summary: ஜூன் மாதத்தில், இந்திய ராணுவ வீரர்களைத் தாக்கியதில் இருந்து, இந்தியா மற்றும் சீனாவுக்கு இடையிலான பிரச்சனைகள், வெறுமனே எல்லைப் பிரச்சனையாக இல்லை. India ban china power equipment import and plan to tax 25% on china solar equipment India hit back china with another ban. India ban Chinese power equipment import and plan to levy 25% tax on Chinese solar equipment. #IndiaChinaBorderFight #IndiaChinaBorder

entry.title: Manuel Jiménez quiere ver Santo Domingo Este libre de contaminación visual de propaganda política en una semana.

link.title: Manuel Jiménez quiere ver Santo Domingo Este libre de contaminación visual de propaganda política en una semana.

entry.title: 201307 BTS interview on Zip FULL (Eng subtitle in description)

link.title: 201307 BTS interview on Zip FULL (Eng subtitle in description)

entry.content:
[ENG TRANSLATION]
mc: do you remember the zip pose?
bts: zip!
q. whats the key point of this song?
jk: the lyrics have the message "don’t lose that shine of yours" we hope that everyone who hears this song keeps the shine they have within them.
they made bts watch the announcer’s dance for "tips on how to improve"
bts: …
bts: …
bts: . . .
mc: the members watch in silence… and then?
jh: shall we dance together? 5, 6, 5 6 7 8~
(announcer in the corner, covering face in shame: what a sight…)
mc: for some reason all the members started imitating announcer! as for the actual improvement tips…
jh: abilities aside, all that matters is that u have fun dancing. thats why as long as u have fun dancing, without being influenced by anything else, u can create a beautiful dance
bts: announcer-san! ganbatte kudasa~i!
(announcer in corner: omg thank u TT these are ppl who’ve danced on the grammy stage so i feel… truly… apologetic… but i think the words as long as u have fun w/o outside influence were amazing! tysm for those words TT)
entry.summary: [ENG TRANSLATION] mc: do you remember the zip pose? bts: zip! q. whats the key point of this song? jk: the lyrics have the message "don’t lose that shine of yours" we hope that everyone who hears this song keeps the shine they have within them. they made bts watch the announcer’s dance for "tips on how to improve" bts: … bts: … bts: . . . mc: the members watch in silence… and then? jh: shall we dance together? 5, 6, 5 6 7 8~ (announcer in the corner, covering face in shame: what a sight…) mc: for some reason all the members started imitating announcer! as for the actual improvement tips… jh: abilities aside, all that matters is that u have fun dancing. thats why as long as u have fun dancing, without being influenced by anything else, u can create a beautiful dance bts: announcer-san! ganbatte kudasa~i! (announcer in corner: omg thank u TT these are ppl who’ve danced on the grammy stage so i feel… truly… apologetic… but i think the words as long as u have fun w/o outside influence were amazing! tysm for those words TT)

entry.title: Tourisme : :Rochefort-en-Terre, village préféré des Français en 2016, envahi par les touristes

link.title: Tourisme : :Rochefort-en-Terre, village préféré des Français en 2016, envahi par les touristes

entry.content:
C’est sans doute l’une des plus belles cités de Bretagne. En 2016, Rochefort-en-Terre (Morbihan) avait été élu village préféré des Français. Depuis, la fréquentation touristique a bondi de 40%.
Retrouver toutes les infos sur la vidéo sur :
entry.summary: C’est sans doute l’une des plus belles cités de Bretagne. En 2016, Rochefort-en-Terre (Morbihan) avait été élu village préféré des Français. Depuis, la fréquentation touristique a bondi de 40%. Retrouver toutes les infos sur la vidéo sur :

entry.title: RGV Reacts To Amitabh Bachchan Testing Positive For Covid-19 Oneindia Telugu

link.title: RGV Reacts To Amitabh Bachchan Testing Positive For Covid-19 Oneindia Telugu

entry.content:
Ram Gopal Varma reacts to Amitabh Bachchan testing positive for Covid-19, "SARKAAAR am sure u will kick Corona". RGV To Amitabh Bachchan, "I’ll Not Pray For You, But I’ll Pray For Corona"
#AishwaryaRaiBachchan
#AaradhyaBachchan
#AmitabhBachchan
#GetwellsoonAmithabbachansir
#COVID19
#JayaBachchan
#Coronavirus
#BigB
#AishwaryaRai
#nanavatihospital
#Mumbai
#Sarkar
సంచలనానికి కేరాఫ్ అడ్రస్‌గా నిలిచే వర్మ.. ఎప్పుడూ వింత కామెంట్లతో వార్తల్లో నిలుస్తూ ఉంటాడు. ఏ విషయంలోనైనా సరే ఆయన చేసే కామెంట్లు అందర్నీ ఆకట్టుకుంటాయి. అందుకే వర్మ శైలి వేరు.. అందరిలో కెల్లా ప్రత్యేకం. తాజాగా అమితాబ్‌ బచ్చన్‌కు కరోనా సోకిందనే వార్త ఇండియాను కుదిపేస్తోండగా.. వర్మ తనదైన శైలో స్పందించాడు. ఆర్జీవీ చేసిన కామెంట్ ప్రస్తుతం సోషల్ మీడియాను ఆకర్షిస్తోంది.
entry.summary: Ram Gopal Varma reacts to Amitabh Bachchan testing positive for Covid-19, "SARKAAAR am sure u will kick Corona". RGV To Amitabh Bachchan, "I’ll Not Pray For You, But I’ll Pray For Corona" #AishwaryaRaiBachchan #AaradhyaBachchan #AmitabhBachchan #GetwellsoonAmithabbachansir #COVID19 #JayaBachchan #Coronavirus #BigB #AishwaryaRai #nanavatihospital #Mumbai #Sarkar సంచలనానికి కేరాఫ్ అడ్రస్‌గా నిలిచే వర్మ.. ఎప్పుడూ వింత కామెంట్లతో వార్తల్లో నిలుస్తూ ఉంటాడు. ఏ విషయంలోనైనా సరే ఆయన చేసే కామెంట్లు అందర్నీ ఆకట్టుకుంటాయి. అందుకే వర్మ శైలి వేరు.. అందరిలో కెల్లా ప్రత్యేకం. తాజాగా అమితాబ్‌ బచ్చన్‌కు కరోనా సోకిందనే వార్త ఇండియాను కుదిపేస్తోండగా.. వర్మ తనదైన శైలో స్పందించాడు. ఆర్జీవీ చేసిన కామెంట్ ప్రస్తుతం సోషల్ మీడియాను ఆకర్షిస్తోంది.

entry.title: Covid-19 : à Nice, une foule se masse pour un concert

link.title: Covid-19 : à Nice, une foule se masse pour un concert

entry.content: La foule est impressionnante. Dans la soirée du samedi 11 juillet, à Nice, des milliers de personnes se sont réunies sur le quai des États-Unis et la promenade des Anglais pour assister au concert du DJ The Avener, présent au sommet de la tour Bellanda. Comme le rapporte France 3 Provence-Alpes-Côte d’Azur, l’ambiance était particulièrement festive, la musique s’est même fait entendre sur des centaines de mètres, et les individus étaient très proches les uns des autres, oubliant pour beaucoup les gestes barrières pour lutter contre l’épidémie de coronavirus.
entry.summary: La foule est impressionnante. Dans la soirée du samedi 11 juillet, à Nice, des milliers de personnes se sont réunies sur le quai des États-Unis et la promenade des Anglais pour assister au concert du DJ The Avener, présent au sommet de la tour Bellanda. Comme le rapporte France 3 Provence-Alpes-Côte d’Azur, l’ambiance était particulièrement festive, la musique s’est même fait entendre sur des centaines de mètres, et les individus étaient très proches les uns des autres, oubliant pour beaucoup les gestes barrières pour lutter contre l’épidémie de coronavirus.

entry.title: Donald Trump thanks PM Modi for Independence Day wish, says ‘America loves India’ Oneindia News

link.title: Donald Trump thanks PM Modi for Independence Day wish, says ‘America loves India’ Oneindia News

entry.content: In another display of bonhomie ahead of US presidential polls, US President Donald Trump has said that America loves India as he thanked Prime Minister Narendra Modi for greeting him on the occasion of the 244th Independence Day of the United States. The Fourth of July – also known as Independence Day or July 4th - is a federal holiday in the US commemorating the publication of the declaration of independence from Great Britain in 1776. Prime Minister Modi on Saturday congratulated President Trump and the people of the US on the count. Responding to the greetings from the prime minister on the popular micro-blogging site, Trump said in a tweet: "Thank you my friend. America loves India!" The Twitter exchange between the two leaders were welcomed by people from both the countries and it went viral on the social media.
entry.summary: In another display of bonhomie ahead of US presidential polls, US President Donald Trump has said that America loves India as he thanked Prime Minister Narendra Modi for greeting him on the occasion of the 244th Independence Day of the United States. The Fourth of July – also known as Independence Day or July 4th - is a federal holiday in the US commemorating the publication of the declaration of independence from Great Britain in 1776. Prime Minister Modi on Saturday congratulated President Trump and the people of the US on the count. Responding to the greetings from the prime minister on the popular micro-blogging site, Trump said in a tweet: "Thank you my friend. America loves India!" The Twitter exchange between the two leaders were welcomed by people from both the countries and it went viral on the social media.

entry.title: Timelapse Shows Toddler Doing Jumps

link.title: Timelapse Shows Toddler Doing Jumps

entry.content:
This little boy loved climbing and jumping. Ever since he was a baby he jumped off and on various surfaces both indoors and outdoors. His jumping skills developed over time.
The underlying music rights are not available for license. For use of the video with the track(s) contained therein, please contact the music publisher(s) or relevant rights holder(s).
entry.summary: This little boy loved climbing and jumping. Ever since he was a baby he jumped off and on various surfaces both indoors and outdoors. His jumping skills developed over time. The underlying music rights are not available for license. For use of the video with the track(s) contained therein, please contact the music publisher(s) or relevant rights holder(s).

entry.title: Beautiful girl dolls

link.title: Beautiful girl dolls

entry.content: Dolls are a Girl’s Best Friend!Dolls are loved by kids around the world, and they are great for teaching emotions and pretend play.
entry.summary: Dolls are a Girl’s Best Friend!Dolls are loved by kids around the world, and they are great for teaching emotions and pretend play.

entry.title: Le temps retrouvé : Pascal Rophé dirige Varèse, Schoeller, Scelsi et Maresz

link.title: Le temps retrouvé : Pascal Rophé dirige Varèse, Schoeller, Scelsi et Maresz

entry.content:
Sous la direction de Pascal Rophé, les percussionnistes de l’Orchestre national de France et de l’Orchestre philharmonique de Radio France jouent les oeuvres de Varèse, Schoeller, Scelsi et Maresz.
Longtemps confinée au rôle de soutien de l’orchestre, la percussion a été traitée avec une imagination croissante par les compositeurs à partir du XIXe siècle. L’instrumentarium s’est alors peu à peu diversifié, et nombre de compositeurs, Honegger, Chostakovitch, Varèse puis bien d’autres, ont montré combien les instruments à percussion pouvaient créer des univers sonores d’une richesse infinie de timbres, de rythmes et de dynamiques. Ce concert donné par des percussionnistes et des pianistes des deux orchestres de Radio France en donne un passionnant aperçu.
Edgar Varese
Ionisation
Philippe Schoeller
Archaos Infinita I&II
Giacinto Scelsi
Rotativa
Yan Maresz
Festin
Percussionnistes de l’Orchestre National de France et de l’Orchestre Philharmonique de Radio France
Catherine Cournot et Franz Michel piano
​Pascal Rophé direction
entry.summary: Sous la direction de Pascal Rophé, les percussionnistes de l’Orchestre national de France et de l’Orchestre philharmonique de Radio France jouent les oeuvres de Varèse, Schoeller, Scelsi et Maresz. Longtemps confinée au rôle de soutien de l’orchestre, la percussion a été traitée avec une imagination croissante par les compositeurs à partir du XIXe siècle. L’instrumentarium s’est alors peu à peu diversifié, et nombre de compositeurs, Honegger, Chostakovitch, Varèse puis bien d’autres, ont montré combien les instruments à percussion pouvaient créer des univers sonores d’une richesse infinie de timbres, de rythmes et de dynamiques. Ce concert donné par des percussionnistes et des pianistes des deux orchestres de Radio France en donne un passionnant aperçu. Edgar Varese Ionisation Philippe Schoeller Archaos Infinita I&II Giacinto Scelsi Rotativa Yan Maresz Festin Percussionnistes de l’Orchestre National de France et de l’Orchestre Philharmonique de Radio France Catherine Cournot et Franz Michel piano ​Pascal Rophé direction

entry.title: Amitabh Bachchan’s video goes viral after testing positive, watch to know more Oneindia News

link.title: Amitabh Bachchan’s video goes viral after testing positive, watch to know more Oneindia News

entry.content:
A video of Amitabh Bachchan, who is currently receiving treatment in Nanavati hospital after being tested for COVID-19, has been going viral. In the throwback video, Big B is seen thanking the doctors, nurses and staff of the hospital for taking good care of him.
Amitabh was heard saying in the video, "Namashkar, this is Amitabh Bachchan. I want to talk to all the doctors, nurses and the staff at Nanavati hospital, for the tremendous work you’re doing in these very trying circumstances. I had shared a recent post on Twitter, which was from a billboard from Surat. The post read - ‘do you know why the temples are closed? Because God is wearing a white coat and working in hospitals."
entry.summary: A video of Amitabh Bachchan, who is currently receiving treatment in Nanavati hospital after being tested for COVID-19, has been going viral. In the throwback video, Big B is seen thanking the doctors, nurses and staff of the hospital for taking good care of him. Amitabh was heard saying in the video, "Namashkar, this is Amitabh Bachchan. I want to talk to all the doctors, nurses and the staff at Nanavati hospital, for the tremendous work you’re doing in these very trying circumstances. I had shared a recent post on Twitter, which was from a billboard from Surat. The post read - ‘do you know why the temples are closed? Because God is wearing a white coat and working in hospitals."

entry.title: F1 GP de Styrie : Hamilton devance Bottas et Verstappen… Le top 10 des pilotes

link.title: F1 GP de Styrie : Hamilton devance Bottas et Verstappen… Le top 10 des pilotes

entry.content: 85e victoire de la carrière de Lewis Hamilton, la première dans ce championnat 2020, au lendemain d’une incroyable séance de qualifications à Styrie. Le Britannique s’est facilement imposé devant Valterrie Bottas. Max Verstappen complète le podium.
entry.summary: 85e victoire de la carrière de Lewis Hamilton, la première dans ce championnat 2020, au lendemain d’une incroyable séance de qualifications à Styrie. Le Britannique s’est facilement imposé devant Valterrie Bottas. Max Verstappen complète le podium.

entry.title: Diduga Hina Profesi Dokter, 5 Akun Facebook Dipolisikan oleh IDI Kabupaten Sumenep

link.title: Diduga Hina Profesi Dokter, 5 Akun Facebook Dipolisikan oleh IDI Kabupaten Sumenep

entry.content:
SUMENEP, KOMPAS.TV - Ikatan Dokter Indonesia atau IDI Cabang Kabupaten Sumenep Jawa Timur melaporkan 5 pemilik akun Facebook ke polisi pada Kamis (09/07).
5 pemilik akun Facebook dilaporkan, karena mengomentari berita kaburnya seorang pasien positif Covid-19 dari RSUD dr. Moh. Anwar Sumenep dengan nada melecehkan.
Bahkan salah satu pemilik akun menghina profesi Dokter dengan menggunakan kata-kata kasar dan tidak sopan, seperti menyebut kata organ vital.
Ketua IDI Sumenep, dr. Abdul Azis mengaku bahwa status dan komenter di Facebook sudah sangat sering menghina dan melecehkan profesi Dokter. Kami awalnya menanggapinya dengan sabar, kami berpikir mungkin masyarakat masih awam dalam memahami virus corona.
Namun komentar di akun Facebook belakangan ini, atau dalam seminggu ini, sudah terlalu kasar dan membuat kesabaran kami habis, khususnya Dokter yang dari kalangan perempuan.
Kami, pengurus IDI, akhirnya memutuskan untuk menempuh jalur hukum dengan melaporkan pemilik akun ke Polisi. Harapannya agar masyarakat tidak terus menerus memojokkan dan menghina profesi Dokter.
Kasatreskrim Polres Sumenep, AKP Dhany Rb mengatakan bahwa pihaknya akan menindak lanjuti laporan tersebut.
Pihaknya akan berkoordinasi dengan Tim Cyber Polda Jatim dan ahli bahasa, karena ada dugaan tindak pidana di bidang Informasi dan Transaksi Elektronik.
#Dokter #Facebook #Covid19
entry.summary: SUMENEP, KOMPAS.TV - Ikatan Dokter Indonesia atau IDI Cabang Kabupaten Sumenep Jawa Timur melaporkan 5 pemilik akun Facebook ke polisi pada Kamis (09/07). 5 pemilik akun Facebook dilaporkan, karena mengomentari berita kaburnya seorang pasien positif Covid-19 dari RSUD dr. Moh. Anwar Sumenep dengan nada melecehkan. Bahkan salah satu pemilik akun menghina profesi Dokter dengan menggunakan kata-kata kasar dan tidak sopan, seperti menyebut kata organ vital. Ketua IDI Sumenep, dr. Abdul Azis mengaku bahwa status dan komenter di Facebook sudah sangat sering menghina dan melecehkan profesi Dokter. Kami awalnya menanggapinya dengan sabar, kami berpikir mungkin masyarakat masih awam dalam memahami virus corona. Namun komentar di akun Facebook belakangan ini, atau dalam seminggu ini, sudah terlalu kasar dan membuat kesabaran kami habis, khususnya Dokter yang dari kalangan perempuan. Kami, pengurus IDI, akhirnya memutuskan untuk menempuh jalur hukum dengan melaporkan pemilik akun ke Polisi. Harapannya agar masyarakat tidak terus menerus memojokkan dan menghina profesi Dokter. Kasatreskrim Polres Sumenep, AKP Dhany Rb mengatakan bahwa pihaknya akan menindak lanjuti laporan tersebut. Pihaknya akan berkoordinasi dengan Tim Cyber Polda Jatim dan ahli bahasa, karena ada dugaan tindak pidana di bidang Informasi dan Transaksi Elektronik. #Dokter #Facebook #Covid19

entry.title: How to Keep Your Skin Firm in Your 40s, According to a Dermatologist

link.title: How to Keep Your Skin Firm in Your 40s, According to a Dermatologist

entry.content: Dermatologist Dra. Kristina Reyes-Bagani of Luminisce shares the skincare habits worth practicing if you want to keep your skin firm and healthy in your 40s.
entry.summary: Dermatologist Dra. Kristina Reyes-Bagani of Luminisce shares the skincare habits worth practicing if you want to keep your skin firm and healthy in your 40s.

entry.title: CBSE Class 12th results declared: How to check result, watch the video to find out Oneindia News

link.title: CBSE Class 12th results declared: How to check result, watch the video to find out Oneindia News

entry.content: The wait of class 12th students of Arts, Commerce and Science streams is finally over as the board has declared the results today at its official result portal. CBSE directly released the scorecard on its website cbseresults.nic.in. Scroll down to check direct link, other sites where results can be viewed. Students can now see their class 12th results 2020 online at carious official websites, IVRS telephone numbers and as well as applications. Lakhs of students were patiently waiting for the results to be released after the CBSE board decided to cancel the pending exams and provide the results according to the new marking scheme.
entry.summary: The wait of class 12th students of Arts, Commerce and Science streams is finally over as the board has declared the results today at its official result portal. CBSE directly released the scorecard on its website cbseresults.nic.in. Scroll down to check direct link, other sites where results can be viewed. Students can now see their class 12th results 2020 online at carious official websites, IVRS telephone numbers and as well as applications. Lakhs of students were patiently waiting for the results to be released after the CBSE board decided to cancel the pending exams and provide the results according to the new marking scheme.

entry.title: Intimidated Homeowner Kicks LIZZO Out of AirBnB

link.title: Intimidated Homeowner Kicks LIZZO Out of AirBnB

entry.content: Over 4th of July weekend, Lizzo rented an AirBnB with her 6 black girlfriends, but the host felt "threatened" by the twerking videos they posted and kicked them out early.
entry.summary: Over 4th of July weekend, Lizzo rented an AirBnB with her 6 black girlfriends, but the host felt "threatened" by the twerking videos they posted and kicked them out early.

entry.title: Oise : une femme enceinte oubliée dans un parloir pendant 16 heures

link.title: Oise : une femme enceinte oubliée dans un parloir pendant 16 heures

entry.content:
Une enquête administrative a été ouverte pour comprendre comment et pourquoi une femme enceinte a pu être oubliée pendant 16 heures au parloir de la prison de Liancourt dans l’Oise. La future maman était venue rendre visite à son compagnon. Une série de négligences semble être à l’origine de l’incident.
Retrouver toutes les infos sur la vidéo sur :
entry.summary: Une enquête administrative a été ouverte pour comprendre comment et pourquoi une femme enceinte a pu être oubliée pendant 16 heures au parloir de la prison de Liancourt dans l’Oise. La future maman était venue rendre visite à son compagnon. Une série de négligences semble être à l’origine de l’incident. Retrouver toutes les infos sur la vidéo sur :

link.title: Thalapathy Vijay to direct Movie • Kadhai, ThiraiKadhai, Eyakkam

entry.content:
#ThalapathyVijay
#Master
தளபதி விஜய் இயக்கி நடிக்க இருப்பதாக நேர்காணல் ஒன்றில் தெரிவித்துள்ளார்.

entry.title: Pub Landlord’s Best Job Advert Ever Oneindia Telugu

link.title: Pub Landlord’s Best Job Advert Ever Oneindia Telugu

entry.content:
Pub landlord’s, no-nonsense job advert in search for staff dubbed ‘best ever’
#UnitedKingdom
#Uk
#BorisJohnson
#Pubs
#TheGeorgepubandgrill
#CraigHarker
#Advertising
#Jobadvertisement
#Marketing
#Britan
క్రయిగ్ హర్కేర్ అనే వ్యక్తి కి ఓ పబ్ ఉంది. దాని పేరు the George pub and grill. ఆయనికి మూడు బ్రాంచ్ లు ఉన్నాయి. పబ్ లు తిరిగి ఓపెన్ కావడం తో హర్కర్ కి కొత్త స్టాఫ్ అవసరం అయ్యింది. దీంతో ఆయన తన పబ్ యొక్క అఫిషియల్ ఫేస్ బుక్ పేజ్ లో జాబ్ ఆఫర్ చేస్తూ ఓ పోస్ట్ పెట్టారు.
entry.summary: Pub landlord’s, no-nonsense job advert in search for staff dubbed ‘best ever’ #UnitedKingdom #Uk #BorisJohnson #Pubs #TheGeorgepubandgrill #CraigHarker #Advertising #Jobadvertisement #Marketing #Britan క్రయిగ్ హర్కేర్ అనే వ్యక్తి కి ఓ పబ్ ఉంది. దాని పేరు the George pub and grill. ఆయనికి మూడు బ్రాంచ్ లు ఉన్నాయి. పబ్ లు తిరిగి ఓపెన్ కావడం తో హర్కర్ కి కొత్త స్టాఫ్ అవసరం అయ్యింది. దీంతో ఆయన తన పబ్ యొక్క అఫిషియల్ ఫేస్ బుక్ పేజ్ లో జాబ్ ఆఫర్ చేస్తూ ఓ పోస్ట్ పెట్టారు.
